message:
feat(daemon): implement daemon core with UDS listener and protocol

Completes bd-1oy. Implements:
- ModelManager with lazy loading and LRU eviction for embedders/rerankers
- MessagePack protocol with versioned envelopes
- Async UDS listener with tokio
- Length-prefixed framing for reliable message boundaries
- Health, Embed, Rerank, Status, Shutdown request handling
- Idle timeout with graceful shutdown
- Socket permissions (0600) and PID file management

All 22 daemon module unit tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
